info.title: LiteGen API
info.description: Universal proxy for AI image and video generation.

get.summary: GET /auth/redirect — Unified OAuth callback for BOTH providers.
get.description:
The deployed Google + GitHub OAuth apps share a single redirect URI
(`https://app.litegen.ai/api/auth/redirect`, served to the backend as
`/auth/redirect` once nginx strips `/api`). We disambiguate the provider via
the short-lived `litegen_oauth_provider` cookie set at `*_start`, then
dispatch to the matching core callback fn.

302.description: Redirect to app after successful auth

get.summary: GET /health — Health check for all providers.
GET /health/live — Simple liveness probe.
GET /v1/account — Get the current user's profile.

patch.summary: PATCH /v1/account — Update the current user's account (e.g. change password).

400.description: Bad request (no changes or missing fields)

get.summary: GET /v1/account/sessions — List the current user's active sessions.

delete.summary: DELETE /v1/account/sessions/{id} — Revoke one of the current user's sessions.

get.summary: GET /v1/apps/{app_id} — Get an application; authorizes via its org (app:read).

delete.summary: DELETE /v1/apps/{app_id} — Delete an application (app:delete via its org).

patch.summary: PATCH /v1/apps/{app_id} — Rename an application (app:write via its org).

get.summary:
GET /v1/apps/{app_id}/provider-credentials — List BYO credentials (provider_cred:read).
Never returns plaintext — only `ProviderCredentialInfo`.

post.summary:
POST /v1/apps/{app_id}/provider-credentials — Store a BYO credential (provider_cred:write).
Encrypts the credential JSON; returns `ProviderCredentialInfo` (no plaintext).

get.summary: GET /v1/apps/{app_id}/storage — read BYO storage config (storage_cred:read). No secret.
GET /v1/auth/config — Public auth-method discovery for the dashboard.
GET /v1/auth/csrf — Return the CSRF token for the current session.
GET /v1/auth/invitations/{token} — Look up an invitation (no auth required).

post.summary: POST /v1/auth/invitations/{token}/accept — Accept an invitation and create an account.
POST /v1/auth/login — Log in with email and password.

get.summary: GET /v1/auth/me — Return the currently authenticated user.
GET /v1/auth/oauth/github/callback — Handle GitHub OAuth callback.

302.description: Redirect to app after successful auth

400.description: State mismatch or no verified email

get.summary: GET /v1/auth/oauth/github/start — Redirect to GitHub OAuth authorize page.
GET /v1/auth/oauth/google/callback — Handle Google OAuth callback.

302.description: Redirect to app after successful auth

get.summary: GET /v1/auth/oauth/google/start — Redirect to Google OAuth authorize page.

post.summary: POST /v1/auth/password-reset/confirm — Confirm a password reset with the token.
POST /v1/auth/password-reset/request — Request a password reset email.
POST /v1/images/cost — Estimate cost for image generation.

get.summary: GET /v1/keys — List API keys.

post.summary: POST /v1/keys — Create a new API key.

get.summary: GET /v1/logs — Paginated + filtered request logs. Supports `?format=csv`.
GET /v1/models — List all available models.
GET /v1/models/{id} — Full schema for one model.
GET /v1/orgs — List the orgs the caller belongs to (any session user).

post.summary: POST /v1/orgs — Create an organization owned by the caller (any session user).

get.summary: GET /v1/orgs/{id} — Get an organization (requires org:read membership).

delete.summary: DELETE /v1/orgs/{id} — Delete an organization (requires org:delete membership).

patch.summary: PATCH /v1/orgs/{id} — Rename an organization (requires org:write membership).

get.summary: GET /v1/orgs/{id}/apps — List applications in an org (requires app:read).
GET /v1/orgs/{id}/members — List org members (requires member:read membership).

post.summary: POST /v1/orgs/{id}/members — Invite a member to this org (requires member:invite).

patch.summary: PATCH /v1/orgs/{id}/members/{user_id} — Change a member's role (requires member:write).

400.description: Cannot change owner via this endpoint

get.summary: GET /v1/stats — Get aggregate usage statistics.
GET /v1/users — List all users (requires user:read:any).

400.description: Bad request (e.g. owner role not allowed)

post.summary: POST /v1/users/transfer-owner — Transfer ownership to another user (Owner only).

patch.summary: PATCH /v1/users/{id} — Update user role or active status (requires user:write:any).

post.summary: POST /v1/videos/cost — Estimate cost for video generation.

get.summary: GET /v1/videos/{id} — Poll the status of an in-flight video generation.

AccountUser.description: Public user view for account responses.

ApiKey.description: API key for authenticating with the LiteGen proxy.

owner_user_id.description: The user who owns this key (None for master-key-created keys).

public_id.description: Public key id shown to customers, e.g. "pk_live_…". None for legacy lg- keys.

tokens_used.description: Running USD spent under this key.

webhook_url.description: Webhook URL for async notifications (future use).

ApiKeyEntry.description: An API key with weight for round-robin distribution.

key.description: The API key value. Stored encrypted at rest.

weight.description: Weight for round-robin (higher = more traffic). Default: 1.

ApiKeyInfo.description: Public view of an API key (no hash).

AppStorageInfo.description: Public view of per-app BYO storage config — NEVER includes the secret.

password_enabled.description: Whether email/password signup + login is enabled.

providers_enabled.description:
OAuth providers with both CLIENT_ID and CLIENT_SECRET configured
(e.g. `["github", "google"]`).

signup_open.description: Whether self-service signup is open (true in hosted mode).

CacheStatus.description: Cache state included in the health response.

base_cost_usd.description: Base cost from the provider in USD.

cost_source.description: Where the cost data came from.

Deployment.description: A single deployment in a routing chain.

max_retries.description: Max retries before falling to next deployment.

respect_health.description: Whether to skip this deployment on health check failure.

ImageGenerationResponse.description:
Response for an image generation request.
Follows OpenAI's images response format for compatibility.

created.description: Unix timestamp of when the request was created.

provider.description: The provider that handled the request.

ImageResult.description: A single generated image in the response.

revised_prompt.description: Revised prompt (if provider modified the prompt, e.g. DALL-E 3).

url.description: URL of the generated image (if response_format=url).

org_id.description:
Organization the invitee will join on accept. Defaults to the
single-tenant default org for legacy/global invites.

role.description: The role the invited user will receive in `org_id` upon accepting.

LatencyPercentiles.description: Latency percentiles for the last N minutes.

is_available.description: Whether the model is currently available.

base_cost_usd.description: Base cost per image/video in USD.

ModelRoute.description: Routing configuration for a model, with fallbacks and weights.

deployments.description: Ordered list of provider deployments to try.

OrgTransferOwnerRequest.description:
Renamed in the OpenAPI schema to `OrgTransferOwnerRequest` to avoid a
component name collision with `users::TransferOwnerRequest`.

enabled.description: Whether this provider config is enabled.

model_mapping.description: Model ID mapping: internal ID → provider's model ID.

ProviderCredentialInfo.description: Public view of a stored BYO provider credential — NEVER the plaintext secret.

PublicUser.description: Public user view returned from user management endpoints.

access_key_id.description: Write-only. Provide WITH `secret_access_key` to set/rotate; omit BOTH to keep existing.

RevokeKeyResponse.description: Response for `DELETE /v1/keys/{id}` and similar revocation endpoints.

org_name.description: Optional organization name (hosted mode). Defaults to the email local-part.

UsageInfo.description: Cost / usage information for a generation.

cost_source.description: Cost source: "dynamic" (from API) or "estimated" (from pricing table).

VideoGenerationResponse.description: Video generation can be async — this is the initial response.
